sample_tweets.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 23.5 TB Breach of Brazilian Health Tech Firm Mobilemed  A ransomware threat actor has allegedly breached Mobilemed, a Brazil-based health technology company specializing in cloud-based Picture Archiving and Communication Systems (PACS). According to a post on an underground forum, the attacker claims to have exfiltrated 23.5 TB of data comprising over 52 million files from the organization's infrastructure.  The post alleges that the stolen data includes sensitive patient information and internal credentials. The actor claims the dump contains: *   35 million records of patient Personally Identifiable Information (PII) *   17,176,370 personal files *   67,493 account PII records  Mobilemed provides critical imaging infrastructure for radiologists, hospitals, and diagnostic centers in Brazil. The exposure of such a large volume of medical data could have severe implications for patient privacy and regulatory compliance under Brazil’s General Data Protection Law (LGPD).  The threat actor demands a ransom of $1,500,000, setting a deadline of August 1, 2026. The post warns that if the payment is not made, the group intends to publish the full dataset or sell it on the dark web. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Mobilemed or third-party security researchers.  #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Sale of 15M Records from Rock N' Cash Casino  A threat actor is allegedly offering full access to the game server and a database containing over 15 million records from the mobile casino application Rock N' Cash. According to a listing on an underground forum, the seller claims to possess 7 gigabytes of SQL data extracted from the service.  The post alleges that the compromised application has been downloaded more than 10 million times on Google Play and is also available on the Apple App Store. The actor claims to have obtained "full access" to the game server alongside the complete user database.  The exposed data reportedly includes: *   15 million lines of SQL data *   Full administrative access to the game server  Rock N' Cash is a popular social casino app developed by Playtika, one of the world's largest online gaming companies. If authentic, the exposure of such a large volume of user data could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns or identity theft against millions of players. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified.

🚨 Alleged Indian Army Air Defence Data Leak on Underground Forum  A post on an underground forum claims to expose data belonging to the Indian Army's Air Defence sector. The listing, authored by a user named 'slepra' on July 10, 2026, is titled 'Army Air Defence India Data,' suggesting the unauthorized disclosure of military-related information.  The source material does not provide specific details regarding the volume of data, the types of records exposed, or the method of acquisition. No screenshots, file names, or sample data were included in the thread to substantiate the claim.  The Indian Army is one of the largest standing armies in the world, and its air defence systems are critical to national security infrastructure. If authentic, the exposure of such data could pose significant risks to national defense operations and strategic planning.  At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified, and no official statement has been issued by the Indian Ministry of Defence or related authorities.

🚨 Alleged L’Assurance Maladie Breach Exposes 66M French Citizens' Health Data  A darkweb forum post claims that a massive data breach has compromised the records of over 66 million French citizens, exposing sensitive health insurance information from L’Assurance Maladie, France’s statutory public health-insurance system. The actor alleges that the data was obtained from the Caisse Nationale de l’Assurance Maladie (CNAM), which coordinates the national system, and its local administrative offices, known as CPAM.  According to the listing, the leaked dataset contains highly sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and financial details for nearly the entire French population. The post enumerates the following categories of exposed data:  *   Identity data including full names, dates of birth, and gender *   French social-security numbers (numéro de sécurité sociale) *   Contact details such as home addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses *   Banking information, specifically IBANs used for reimbursements *   Medical-administrative records, including primary care physician details and long-term illness (ALD) diagnoses *   Account metadata and audit logs  The source material includes sample records showing fields such as numero_secu, iban_remboursement, medecin_traitant (treating physician), and specific medical conditions like "Diabète de type 1 et diabète de type 2" (Type 1 and Type 2 Diabetes). The data also reveals the status of rights (statut_droits) and reimbursement rates (taux_remboursement).  L’Assurance Maladie is a critical national infrastructure entity in France, managing healthcare coverage and reimbursements for all residents. A breach of this scale would represent one of the largest compromises of citizen data in European history if verified. The exposure of medical conditions and banking details could facilitate targeted fraud, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against millions of individuals.  At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from CNAM or French authorities.

🚨Alleged Daryn.online Breach Exposes 4.2M Kazakh User Records  A darkweb forum post claims the exposure of 4.2 million user records from daryn.online, a prominent educational platform in Kazakhstan. The listing, posted on an underground forum, alleges that a comprehensive database containing personal information, credentials, and academic data for students, teachers, and administrators has been compromised.  According to the post, the leaked dataset includes sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and authentication details. The actor lists the following fields as exposed:  *   Full names (first and last) *   Phone numbers and email addresses *   Password hashes (bcrypt format) *   Individual Identification Numbers (IIN) *   Birthdates and gender *   User roles (student, teacher, admin) *   Academic metrics (grades, ratings, lesson counts) *   Last known IP addresses  The source material includes sample entries showing hashed passwords, active session tokens, and detailed profiles of educators, including one administrator with the email "admin6@mail.ru" and another with "support@daryn.online". The data also reveals internal identifiers such as user_id, school_id, and region_id, suggesting a structured database dump rather than a scraped surface-level leak.  Daryn.online is a significant player in Kazakhstan's EdTech sector, providing online tutoring and preparation for national university entrance exams. The exposure of millions of records, including minors' data and teacher credentials, poses significant privacy risks and potential for credential stuffing or phishing attacks against the educational community.  At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Daryn.online or security researchers.

sample_tweets.text: Reddit remains one of the most valuable sources for OSINT, threat intelligence, and cyber investigations, but finding the right information often requires more than Reddit's native search.  We've compiled a list of some of the best Reddit search tools to help security researchers, investigators, and analysts search posts, comments, users, and historical discussions more efficiently.  Featured tools include: • Arctic Shift • Reddit Comment Search • PullPush • Redective • Better Reddit Search • OSINT.IO • Social Searcher • Reddit Insight  Analyst Note: Since Reddit restricted access to the original Pushshift API, many legacy tools have become unreliable. Modern alternatives now provide the best capabilities for historical searches, user profiling, and OSINT investigations.  Which Reddit search tool is your favorite, and which one should we add to our next list?  #DDW #OSINT #Reddit #CyberSecurity
The original progress bar anxiety.  Estimated time remaining: 4,381 years.  Accurate? Not really. Stressful? Absolutely.  #DDW #TechHumor #Nostalgia #Computers

💧 How Much Water Does AI Really Use?  A widely shared estimate claims that generating a 100-word GPT-4 email can require roughly 500 mL of water when data-center cooling and electricity generation are included.  * The estimate is model- and location-dependent, not a fixed cost for every prompt. * Researchers project global AI workloads could withdraw 4.2–6.6 billion m³ of water annually by 2027. * Water withdrawal is not the same as permanent water consumption. * AI companies still disclose limited standardized data on per-query water use.  Analyst Note: AI’s water footprint is real, but viral “one prompt equals one bottle” claims often remove the assumptions behind the calculation. The larger issue is the rapid expansion of data centers in water-stressed regions and the lack of comparable environmental reporting.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #AI

🇺🇸 GiveMeTheVIN Customer Database Allegedly Leaked  A threat actor has posted what they claim is a database associated with GiveMeTheVIN, a US-based vehicle-buying platform.  According to the visible sample, the dataset may include:  * Customer names and email addresses * Phone numbers * Full postal addresses * City, state and ZIP code * Transaction amounts and references * Payment or receiving-party identifiers * Processing status and timestamps  Analyst Note: The authenticity, scope and freshness of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the combination of customer identity and transaction data could support vehicle-sale scams, payment fraud, impersonation and highly targeted phishing.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #GiveMeTheVIN

🇺🇸 United States - GiveMeTheVIN.com Data Breach Exposes Customer and Vehicle Data  GiveMeTheVIN.com, a United States-based online platform specializing in purchasing vehicles nationwide, has allegedly been compromised, with its database exposed on an underground forum. The service facilitates the sale of used cars, requiring users to submit vehicle information, including VINs, and personal details to receive cash offers.  The allegedly compromised data includes: *   Customer names *   Addresses *   Phone numbers *   Email addresses *   Vehicle Identification Numbers (VINs) *   Vehicle details *   Driver's license information *   Financial payment information

🇨🇳 Alleged Database of 550 Million Chinese Phone Records Offered for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing information associated with Chinese citizens’ phone numbers.  According to the forum post:  * Claimed volume: 550 million records * Sample data was published as alleged proof * Visible fields appear to include phone numbers, names, regional information, and other associated personal data * The seller is directing prospective buyers to Telegram  Analyst Note: The authenticity, source, freshness, and uniqueness of the dataset have not been independently verified. A dataset of this scale may contain duplicated, aggregated, scraped, or previously leaked records rather than evidence of a single new breach.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #China

🇯🇵 Japanese Rental Platform Data and Source Code Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor claims to be selling databases and website source code associated with Uchicomi, a Japanese property-rental platform.  According to the forum post:  * Target: uchicomi.com and related subdomains * Allegedly exposed assets include application source code and multiple databases * The shared directory sample references development files, dependencies, scripts, configuration-related files, logs, and public web assets * The seller claims the package covers the platform’s main domain and subdomains  Analyst Note: The claim has not been independently verified. Source-code exposure can create long-term risk by revealing application architecture, internal endpoints, dependencies, embedded secrets, and vulnerabilities that may support follow-on attacks.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Japan

🇩🇪 German E-Commerce Database Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to baumschule-nielsen.de, a German online plant and nursery retailer.  According to the listing:  * Claimed volume: approximately 60,000 records * Dataset allegedly includes customer, address, and order information * Visible sample fields include names, company details, email addresses, phone numbers, password-related fields, VAT IDs, registration status, login activity, birthdays, order counts, order totals, and account metadata * The seller is offering the database through a cybercrime forum and accepts a middleman for the transaction  Analyst Note: The authenticity, freshness, and source of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the information could enable phishing, credential attacks, account takeover attempts, and order-related fraud targeting customers.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

🇫🇷 Litige.fr Allegedly Exposed 595,024 User Records  A threat actor claims to have exploited multiple authorization flaws affecting Litige.fr, a French legal-services platform.  According to the forum post:  * Approximately 595,024 user profiles were allegedly collected. * An unauthenticated IDOR reportedly exposed personal data without login or session validation. * Claimed exposed information includes names, email addresses, phone numbers, postal and IP addresses, dates and places of birth, nationality, company details, and legal status. * The actor also alleges account-takeover and document-access flaws affecting user profiles, staff accounts, and legal case files.  Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the combination of exposed PII, legal documents, and account-control weaknesses could create significant risks of identity theft, extortion, impersonation, and targeted legal-themed phishing.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

🇩🇪 gokart-profi.de Database Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to gokart-profi.de, a German online retailer specializing in go-kart products and parts.  According to the listing:  * Claimed volume: 60,000 records * The database is being offered for sale * Sample records appear to include customer account and order-related information * Visible fields suggest names, email addresses, postal addresses, account identifiers, password-reset tokens, and other e-commerce metadata may be included  Analyst Note: The authenticity, age, and source of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the exposed information could support phishing, credential attacks, account takeover attempts, and fraudulent order-related scams.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

🇯🇵  Japan Forex Leads Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim are Japanese forex customer leads sourced from Exclusive Markets Japan.  According to the listing:  * 10,000 leads offered for $500 * 20,000 leads offered for $800 * 50,000 leads offered for $1,500 * Sample fields include customer name, phone number, email address, account status, billing country, assigned agent, first-time deposit status, deposit amount, and total deposited funds  Analyst Note: The authenticity and origin of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the information could support highly targeted investment scams, account impersonation, phishing, and fraudulent recovery schemes aimed at individuals known to trade forex.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Japan

🇫🇷 Alleged Sephora France Database Offered for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to Sephora France.  According to the forum post:  * Claimed volume: 15 million records * The database is being offered for sale * No source, breach date, data fields, or technical evidence are visible in the listing  Analyst Note: The claim has not been independently verified. The record count alone does not establish that the data originated from Sephora or represents a new breach. Additional samples and technical validation would be required before confirming the incident.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Sephora

🚨 AI-Assisted Research Uncovers 15-Year-Old Linux Kernel Flaw  Researchers have disclosed GhostLock, tracked as CVE-2026-43499, a Linux kernel vulnerability introduced around 2011.  Allows a locally authenticated, unprivileged user to gain root access May enable container escape and compromise the underlying host Affects multiple major Linux distributions using the vulnerable kernel code Discovered by Nebula Security’s AI-powered vulnerability research system  The vulnerability exists in the kernel’s futex locking subsystem and has been assigned a CVSS score of 7.8. Organizations should install vendor-issued kernel updates, prioritizing multi-tenant servers, CI runners and systems that execute untrusted code. (The Hacker News)  Analyst Note: GhostLock demonstrates how AI-assisted security research can identify subtle vulnerabilities that remained undetected through years of conventional review. The same capability will inevitably accelerate vulnerability discovery for both defenders and attackers.  #DDW #Intelligence #Linux #CyberSecurity

🇫🇷 France Pare-Brise Allegedly Exposed Through IDOR and XSS Flaws  A threat actor claims to have identified vulnerabilities affecting France Pare-Brise, a major French automotive glass repair network.  According to the post:  * More than 100,000 users may be affected. * An IDOR vulnerability allegedly exposed large numbers of certified invoice PDFs. * A separate XSS flaw was also claimed. * Exposed information may include names, addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, vehicle details, registration data, VINs, signatures, insurance records, SIRET/VAT information, IBANs, RIB details, and expert reports.  Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the exposed invoices could support identity theft, payment fraud, insurance scams, and highly targeted phishing campaigns.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

llm_summary:
🤖 [GEMINI 분석] 2026-07-14 07:53 KST
🟠 위협 점수: 8/10 (높음)

### 1. 현재 주요 사이버보안 트렌드
최근 공격자들은 LLM과 AI 도구를 활용하여 공격의 전 과정을 자동화하는 'Autonomous Attack' 단계로 진입하고 있으며, 특히 `JADEPUFFER`와 같은 사례처럼 정찰부터 데이터 파괴까지 31초 만에 수행하는 자율형 공격이 보고되고 있습니다 ([connect24h](https://twitter.com/connect24h/status/2076797170183999532)). 또한, macOS 환경을 타겟으로 한 `CrashStealer`와 같이 Notarized Dropper를 이용해 Gatekeeper를 우회하는 정교한 정보 탈취형 악성코드가 확산 중입니다 ([TheHackerNews](https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/crashstealer-macos-malware-uses.html)). 공급망 공격 역시 지속되어 `Jscrambler` npm 패키지 백도어 사례와 같이 신뢰받는 개발 도구를 악용한 침해 사고가 빈번하게 발생하고 있습니다 ([BleepingComputer](https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-backdoor-jscrambler-npm-package-with-infostealer-malware/)).

### 2. 주요 위협 행위자 / 캠페인
- **Static Tundra (FSB Center 16)**: 통신, 에너지, 금융, 정부 등 6개 핵심 산업의 네트워크 장비를 타겟으로 설정 오류 및 취약점을 악용하여 침투 ([CyberScoop](https://cyberscoop.com/russian-fsb-cisco-joint-cybersecurity-advisory/)).
- **Cavern Manticore**: 이란 연계 APT 그룹으로, 이스라엘을 주요 타겟으로 하는 모듈형 C2 프레임워크를 운영 중 ([Check Point Research](https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/cavern-manticore-exposing-iran-linked-modular-c2-framework/)).
- **Armored Likho**: 러시아 내 조직을 대상으로 spear-phishing과 AI 생성 로더, `BusySnake Stealer`를 활용한 캠페인 수행 ([Securelist](https://securelist.com/tr/armored-likho-apt-with-busysnake-stealer/120292/)).
- **The Gentlemen**: 어필리에이트 모델을 기반으로 급성장 중인 랜섬웨어 그룹으로, 기업 대상 파괴적 공격 수행 ([Unit42](https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/the-gentlemen-ransomware/)).

### 3. 한국 관련 위협
- **일본 교통(Nihon Kotsu) 사이버 공격**: 일본 최대 택시 운영사의 시스템이 마비되었으며, 한국 내 보안 커뮤니티에서도 해당 사건을 공급망 및 인프라 위협 사례로 주시 중 ([securityLab_jp](https://twitter.com/securityLab_jp/status/2076796562756526088)).
- **피싱 메일 유포**: 프로젝트 제안서 및 송금 확인서를 위장한 피싱 메일이 국내 기업을 대상으로 지속 유포 중 ([AhnLab ASEC](https://asec.ahnlab.com/ko/94430/)).
- **북한 연계 공격**: `chai-as-init` npm 패키지 공급망 공격 및 `Kimsuky`의 스피어 피싱 공격이 지속적으로 확인됨 ([이스트시큐리티 알약](https://blog.alyac.co.kr/5766)).

### 4. 주요 CVE / 취약점
- **CVE-2026-59801**: 9Router ~0.4.41, CVSS 9.8, 인증되지 않은 원격 코드 실행 취약점 ([OrizonCyber](https://twitter.com/OrizonCyber/status/2076796337329176822)).
- **CVE-2026-0288**: PAN-OS 10.2~12.1, CVSS 9.2, User-ID TSA 설정 시 원격 코드 실행 가능 ([connect24h](https://twitter.com/connect24h/status/2076795760923099281)).
- **CVE-2026-5721**: RabbitMQ, CVSS 8.7, OAuth client secret 노출로 인한 브로커 탈취 가능 ([SecurityWeek](https://www.securityweek.com/rabbitmq-vulnerability-threatens-enterprise-systems/)).
- **CVE-2026-62186**: OpenClaw < 2026.6.8, CVSS 7.6, HTTP 모델 오버라이드 권한 우회 ([KaitanSecurity](https://twitter.com/KaitanSecurity/status/2076796317943120348)).

### 5. IOC 요약
- **도메인**: doctususa.com ([BreachHistoryBH](https://twitter.com/BreachHistoryBH/status/2076764656425693505)), Litige.fr ([BreachHistoryBH](https://twitter.com/BreachHistoryBH/status/2076764382466392141))
- **해시**: 없음
- **CVE**: CVE-2026-59801, CVE-2026-0288, CVE-2026-5721, CVE-2026-62186

### 6. 즉각 대응 권고
- **패치 및 업데이트**: PAN-OS 및 RabbitMQ 등 인터넷 노출 관리 인터페이스의 보안 패치를 즉시 적용하고, CISA BOD 26-04에 따라 3일 이내 Remediation 완료.
- **공급망 검증**: npm 패키지 사용 시 `chai-as-init` 등 악성 패키지 포함 여부를 확인하고, 개발 환경의 의존성 관리 도구에 대한 보안 스캔 강화.
- **엔드포인트 보안**: macOS 환경에서 Apple의 공식 crash-reporting 도구로 위장한 `CrashStealer` 유입 방지를 위해 출처 불분명한 패키지 실행 차단 및 EDR 모니터링 강화.

### 7. 위협 수준 평가
- **점수**: 8/10

📊 Gemini 토큰: 이번 15,000개 (입력 13,504 / 출력 1,496)
📈 세션 누적: 15,000 / 1,000,000 (1.5%) | 세션 잔여 추정 985,000개

news_articles.title: 락인컴퍼니 모바일 화면보안 서비스 LISS, GS인증 1등급 획득
news_articles.summary: 락인컴퍼니가 모바일 화면보안 서비스 LISS(리스)로 한국정보통신기술협회(TTA)의 소프트웨어 품질 인증 제도인 GS 인증 1등급을 획득했다.LISS는 모바일 앱 실행 중 발생할 수 있는 화면 캡처, 화면 녹화, 화면 공유, 원격제어 앱 악용 등으로 인한 개인정보 및 중요 화면 정보 유출을 차단하기 위해 설계된 모바일 전용 화면보안 서비스다. 원격제어 앱 탐지와 화면 정보 보호 기능을 갖춰 앱 내 민감 화면의 무단 노출과 복제 위협에 대응한다.SDK 형태로 제공되어 복잡한 개발 과정 없이 서비스 앱 내에 보안 기능을 구현할 수 있다

news_articles.title: 금융권 양자컴퓨팅 위협 대비...블록에스-케이스마텍-금융결제원 3자 협력

news_articles.title: 아이티아이즈, 캔톤 네트워크와 손잡고 국내 금융 블록체인 시장 공략
news_articles.summary: 아이티아이즈가 글로벌 기관용 블록체인 네트워크인 '캔톤 네트워크(Canton Network)'와 국내 금융시장 공동 대응을 위한 포괄적 업무협약(MOU) 체결을 추진한다.양측은 현재 협약의 세부 내용을 조율하는 최종 단계에 있으며, 협약 체결 시 아이티아이즈는 캔톤의 국내 금융권 안착을 기술적으로 지원하는 파트너 역할을 맡게 된다.캔톤 네트워크는 골드만삭스, HSBC, 나스닥, 미국 예탁결제원(DTCC) 등 글로벌 금융기관들이 참여하는 금융기관 전용 블록체인이다. 제도권 금융회사들이 규제를 준수하며 주식, 채권, 부동산 등의 자산을
